synthesis_narrative: Three of three available specialists voted bearish (level_thesis output missing — partial data day), driven by a CLEAN_BEAR ribbon with 78-cent spread, a dominant 11:50 ET red bar on 4.6x volume, and risk-off sector rotation (XLE +1.26% vs XLF -0.43%); however, SPY at 739.08 sits only 54 cents above the HELD Active support at 738.54 that survived yesterday's flush, and the v5 HELD battle-grade penalty drops post-adjustment confidence to 30 — below the 40-point NO_TRADE gate. The critical binary at the open: bears need a confirmed break of 738.54 on volume to justify puts, bulls need a hold + reclaim of 740.00 to flip structure — watch these two prices simultaneously for directional resolution.
